description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a rustic, textured chocolate exterior, giving it a homemade appearance. The top is decorated with dollops of white cream, each topped with a small red cherry-like garnish, arranged evenly around the perimeter. A single candle stands upright in the center of the cake, suggesting it is intended for a celebration such as a birthday. The cake sits on a purple, crinkled paper or foil base, which adds a splash of color and separates it from the surface below. The sides of the cake show visible swirls and uneven layers of chocolate icing, enhancing its handcrafted look. The overall presentation is festive and inviting, suitable for display at a party or outdoor urban gathering.
description: A round, rustic chocolate cake with white cream dollops, red cherry decorations, and a single candle on top, set on a purple base. The cake has a textured, homemade appearance and festive presentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the candle centered on top, with all cream dollops and cherries visible, and the purple base clearly seen.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the cake's textured chocolate sides and the arrangement of cream dollops and cherries, with the candle still visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the candle and most decorations visible, highlighting the cake's round shape and the uneven chocolate icing.
description_view_3: Back view showing the cake's height and the rustic, swirled chocolate icing, with the purple base most prominent and fewer decorations visible.
